no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... && lefthook run pre-commit
summary: The runner-backed bead lifecycle lint hook is already implemented in cli/internal/agent/lint_hook.go and covered by cli/internal/agent/lint_hook_test.go, so no code changes were required in this worktree.
evidence:
  - NewPreDispatchLintHook builds the lint prompt, dispatches through dispatchViaResolvedConfig, and parses structured LintResult JSON.
  - TestLintHook_UsesRunnerLibrary asserts the injected AgentRunner path and the no-os/exec / no-ddx-agent-run static check.
  - TestLintHook_PromptIncludesStandaloneBead, TestLintHook_BadJSON_ReturnsInfrastructureError, TestLintHook_Timeout_ReturnsInfrastructureError, and TestLintHook_EmptyOutput_ReturnsInfrastructureError cover the prompt contract and fail-open error cases.
